faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our treatments, financing options, and what to expect during your visit.
faq.contactUs: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our friendly team is here to help you with any additional information you need.

cosmetic1.q: How long do porcelain veneers last?
cosmetic1.a: With proper care and regular check-ups, porcelain veneers typically last 10-15 years or longer. We use high-quality materials that resist staining and chipping.

cosmetic2.q: Will I experience sensitivity after teeth whitening?
cosmetic2.a: Some patients experience temporary sensitivity, but our professional whitening systems include desensitizing agents to minimize discomfort. Any sensitivity usually subsides within 24-48 hours.

cosmetic3.q: What is the Smile Design process?
cosmetic3.a: Smile Design is a comprehensive planning process where we use digital technology to analyze your facial features and design a smile that perfectly complements your unique look before any treatment begins.

general1.q: How often should I have a dental cleaning?
general1.a: We recommend professional cleanings every 6 months for most patients. However, if you have a history of gum disease or other oral health concerns, we may suggest more frequent visits.

general2.a: Sealants provide a protective barrier against decay-causing bacteria, particularly on the chewing surfaces of back teeth. They are a highly effective preventive measure for both children and adults.

general3.a: Yes, digital X-rays are extremely safe and emit up to 90% less radiation than traditional film X-rays. They also provide instant, high-definition images for more accurate diagnoses.

ortho1.q: Should I choose Invisalign or traditional braces?
ortho1.a: Invisalign is ideal for discreetly correcting mild to moderate alignment issues, while traditional braces may be better for complex cases. We will recommend the best option for your specific needs during your consultation.

ortho2.q: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
ortho2.a: Treatment time varies depending on the complexity of your case, but most patients complete their treatment within 12 to 24 months. We can provide a more accurate timeline after your exam.

ortho3.q: Do I need to wear a retainer after treatment?
ortho3.a: Yes, wearing a retainer is essential to prevent your teeth from shifting back into their original positions. We offer both removable and fixed retainer options to maintain your new smile.

implants1.q: What is the success rate of dental implants?
implants1.a: Dental implants have a success rate of over 95%. With proper placement and care, they are a permanent solution for missing teeth that look, feel, and function like natural teeth.

implants2.q: What is the recovery process like for dental implants?
implants2.a: Most patients experience mild discomfort for a few days, which can be managed with over-the-counter pain relievers. You can typically return to work and normal activities within 1-2 days.

implants3.q: Why are implants better than bridges?
implants3.a: Unlike bridges, implants do not require altering adjacent healthy teeth. They also stimulate the jawbone to prevent bone loss, which helps maintain your facial structure and oral health.

endo1.a: Modern root canal therapy is virtually painless thanks to advanced anesthetics and techniques. The procedure is designed to relieve the pain caused by infection, not cause it.

endo2.q: What are the signs of a pulp infection?
endo2.a: Common signs include severe toothache, prolonged sensitivity to heat or cold, discoloration of the tooth, and swelling or tenderness in the nearby gums.

endo3.q: Why should I save my natural tooth?
endo3.a: Saving your natural tooth with a root canal is always the best option when possible. It maintains your natural bite, efficient chewing, and normal sensation, which no replacement can fully replicate.

surgical1.q: How long is the recovery after wisdom tooth removal?
surgical1.a: Initial healing typically takes 3-5 days. You may experience some swelling and discomfort, but following our post-operative instructions will help ensure a smooth and speedy recovery.

surgical2.a: Bone grafting is often required when there isn't enough healthy jawbone to support a dental implant. It builds up the bone to ensure a stable and long-lasting foundation for your implant.

surgical3.q: How do you treat gum disease?
surgical3.a: We offer a range of treatments from scaling and root planing (deep cleaning) to advanced laser therapy and gum grafting, depending on the severity of the disease.

facial1.q: How do wrinkle relaxers complement my smile?
facial1.a: Wrinkle relaxers can enhance your smile by smoothing lip lines, correcting a "gummy smile," and relaxing facial muscles to frame your new smile with a more youthful and refreshed appearance.

facial2.q: Will my dermal filler results look natural?
facial2.a: Absolutely. Our expert injectors use a "less is more" approach to restore volume and enhance contours subtly, ensuring you look like a refreshed version of yourself, never overdone.

facial3.q: How long do facial esthetic treatments last?
facial3.a: Wrinkle relaxer results typically last 3-4 months, while dermal fillers can last anywhere from 6 to 18 months, depending on the product used and the area treated.

financing1.q: What are the benefits of the ID Bright Smile Plan?
financing1.a: Our membership plan includes two professional cleanings, unlimited digital X-rays and exams, and 20% off all other dental treatments for a low annual fee, with no insurance hassles.

financing2.q: Is the membership plan better than insurance?
financing2.a: For many patients, yes. It eliminates deductibles, waiting periods, annual maximums, and claim denials, providing transparent and affordable access to premium dental care.

financing3.q: What flexible payment options do you offer?
financing3.a: We accept all major credit cards and offer flexible financing through Cherry and CareCredit, including 0% APR options for qualified patients, to make your treatment affordable.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Discover the story behind ID WELLNESS DENTAL and our commitment to your health and beauty.

story.title: Our Evolution
story.p1: At ID Wellness, our journey has always been guided by one simple mission: to care for our community by providing high-quality, personalized healthcare services.
story.p2: What began as a wellness and aesthetic center gradually evolved as we listened closely to the needs of our patients. Over the past two years, dental care became one of the most requested and valued services in our practice. Through this experience, we realized that our community needed a trusted place focused on delivering exceptional dental care in a modern, comfortable environment.
story.p3: Today, ID Wellness has proudly evolved into a dedicated dental clinic, allowing us to focus entirely on what matters most, your smile, your oral health, and your long-term wellbeing.
story.p4: Our team is committed to combining advanced dental technology, personalized treatment plans, and a patient-centered approach to ensure every visit is comfortable, transparent, and results-driven. From preventive care to restorative and cosmetic dentistry, we strive to deliver treatments that improve both function and confidence.
story.p5: This transformation represents our commitment to growth, innovation, and most importantly, serving our community in the best way possible.
story.p6: At ID Wellness Dental Clinic, your smile is our priority.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Our board-certified specialists and dedicated professionals are here to provide the highest standard of care.

mohammed.name: Dr. Liya Mohammed, DDS
mohammed.title: Board Member
mohammed.shortBio: Dr. Liya Mohammed is a highly skilled dentist graduated from NYU, dedicated to delivering exceptional, patient-centered care. With extensive experience in advanced procedures like implants and cosmetic dentistry, she focuses on long-term oral health and beautiful results.

fullBio.p1: Dr. Liya Mohammed is a highly skilled and compassionate dentist dedicated to delivering exceptional dental care with a patient-centered approach. She graduated from the New York University College of Dentistry (NYU) in 2014 and has been practicing dentistry continuously since then, gaining extensive experience across a wide range of dental procedures.
fullBio.p2: Dr. Mohammed provides comprehensive dental care, from routine examinations and preventive treatments to advanced procedures such as dental implants, root canal therapy (RCT), periodontal treatments, restorative dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, surgical procedures, and bone grafting. Her clinical experience allows her to create precise and personalized treatment plans tailored to each patient's needs.
fullBio.p3: Her primary languages are English and Amharic, allowing her to communicate comfortably with a broad range of patients. She also has working knowledge of Portuguese and Spanish, helping her connect with even more members of the diverse community she serves.
fullBio.p4: Dr. Mohammed shares the philosophy of care at ID Wellness Dental Clinic, where every patient is treated with respect, attention, and dedication. Her priority is always to provide the best possible treatment approach, focusing on long-term oral health, comfort, and beautiful results.
fullBio.p5: She believes dentistry is not only about treating teeth, but about improving confidence, health, and overall quality of life. Dr. Mohammed is proud to serve the Newark community and is committed to helping patients achieve healthy, confident smiles.

paneca.name: Dr. Liany Rodriguez Paneca, DMD
paneca.title: Associate Dentist
paneca.shortBio: Dr. Liany Rodriguez Paneca brings a modern, patient-focused approach to dentistry, combining advanced clinical training with a strong commitment to excellence in care.

fullBio.p1: Dr. Liany Rodriguez Paneca brings a modern, patient-focused approach to dentistry, combining advanced clinical training with a strong commitment to excellence in care.
fullBio.p2: She completed her dental education at the prestigious University of Pennsylvania – Penn Dental Medicine, where she refined her skills in comprehensive and restorative dentistry.
fullBio.p3: With experience practicing in New Jersey, Dr. Paneca is skilled in delivering a wide range of treatments, including preventive care, restorative procedures, extractions, and endodontic treatments.
fullBio.p4: Her philosophy centers on providing a comfortable, personalized experience while ensuring the highest standards of precision and care. She is dedicated to helping patients feel confident in their smiles and their overall oral health.

santos.title: Office Manager
santos.shortBio: Clara Santos is the Office Manager at ID Wellness Dental Clinic, ensuring every patient receives a smooth, welcoming, and well-organized experience. With extensive experience in dental management, she expertly guides patients through appointments, insurance, and treatment scheduling.

fullBio.p1: Clara Santos is the Office Manager at ID Wellness Dental Clinic, where she plays a key role in ensuring that every patient receives a smooth, welcoming, and well-organized experience from the moment they contact the office.
fullBio.p2: With extensive experience in dental office management, Clara is known for her excellent communication skills and her ability to guide patients through every step of their visit. She assists with appointment coordination, insurance questions, treatment scheduling, and patient support, helping make each visit as comfortable and stress-free as possible.
fullBio.p3: Clara is passionate about building strong relationships with patients and making sure they feel heard, respected, and well cared for. Her friendly approach and attention to detail help create the warm and professional environment that defines ID Wellness Dental Clinic.
fullBio.p4: Working closely with the clinical team, Clara helps ensure that the office operates efficiently while maintaining the high standards of care that patients expect.
